reasoning: No analytic solution is available, so we prioritize smaller residual errors. Its runtime (22.98s) is also the fastest among the accurate plans. 'plan_fd_imex_highres' has higher residuals (1.01e-14, 4.77e-14) and is slower (42.05s). 'plan_spectral_explicit_mediumres' is less accurate by many orders of magnitude (residual_l2 40.15, relative_residual 56.79). Therefore, 'plan_spectral_imex_highres' is clearly the best choice, balancing both accuracy and efficiency.
